title: Microsoft SQL Server 2025 Developer Edition
description: Installs SQL Server 2025 Developer Edition (17.0.1000.7) using Chocolatey.

IsoPath.description: Local path to SQL Server 2025 ISO. If empty, Chocolatey downloads the ISO.

IgnorePendingReboot.description: Skip pending reboot check (may cause installation failure).

SqlSetupParameters.description: Extra parameters passed directly to SQL Server setup.
